reason: The candidate matches the reference's core facts exactly: ~$0 federal tax, 100% QSBS exclusion under §1202 for stock acquired after 9/27/2010 and held >5 years, cap of greater of $10M or 10x basis, $8M under cap, exclusion not subject to AMT or NIIT. It adds correct extra caveats (original issuance, gross assets test, active business requirement, state tax nonconformity) without contradicting anything in the reference.
